affected_pattern: Accounts with recently expired promotional bundles showing $0 on the bill after bundle end
root_cause: Promotion expiry handler did not re-activate the base tariff — the offer-management microservice marked the promotion inactive but failed to publish a 'restore-base-tariff' event, leaving the billing catalog without any active rate plan.
supporting_evidence: Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: Promotion Expiry Handler Defect pattern
Kafka topic offer-events has 'promotion.ended' without matching 'tariff.restored' events
Offer-management service release 2026.03.11 changed event emission order
recommended_action: Publish retroactive 'tariff.restored' events for all affected accounts
Reprocess the current billing cycle to apply base tariff charges
Hotfix offer-management service to emit both events atomically
Add a reconciliation job comparing offer-ended vs tariff-restored counts daily
